trivia_bullets.text: Part of MKM (February 9, 2024) on Ravnica — a top-down murder-mystery set involving the Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations.
Scryfall type line is Creature — Human Detective (red-green uncommon, collector no. 147); artist Francisco Miyara.
"I won't waste my time hunting down petty thieves while my brother's killer still walks free." — anonymous tracker; establishes personal vengeance motive over civic duty.
Triggered ability (2 damage when opponent sacrifices an artifact) is a narrow sideboard effect; ~0.1% Commander inclusion rate (~6.35K of 4.39M decks tracked).
sources: EDHREC: MKM set page via WebSearch snippet
